displayNameZh: 品牌装饰剥除：价值还剩什么？
summary: Yt Brand Value Stripped component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的品牌装饰剥除：价值还剩什么？组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-brand-value-stripped/src/YtBrandValueStripped.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtBrandValueStripped` and `ytBrandValueStrippedDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Brand Value Stripped Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-brand-value-stripped to my project. Preserve the exported YtBrandValueStrippedProps API and register the YtBrandValueStripped composition with the default props.
